# `api.account.get_profile`

> `GET /account/profile` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.account.get_profile() -> AccountProfile
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab account get_profile
```

``GET /account/profile`` — the authenticated user's account profile.

Returns the profile of whoever the client's token belongs to
(user name, email, company, contact id, roles).

Response model: AccountProfile

## Response

Returns `AccountProfile`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `userName` | `Optional[str]` | no | Login user name |
| `email` | `Optional[str]` | no | Account email address |
| `companyId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Company UUID |
| `contactId` | `Optional[int]` | no | Contact ID |
| `roles` | `Optional[list[str]]` | no | Role names assigned to the user |
